title: I've been testing an idea for the last few months.
author: Away_Morning5245
selftext:
What if you could take a screenshot of a TradingView chart and have AI instantly identify:

* Market structure
* Order blocks
* Fair value gaps
* Liquidity zones
* Potential entry and exit levels

That's exactly what I built with a Chrome extension called ChartSense AI.

The goal wasn't to replace traders. The goal was to remove some of the emotional bias that happens when you're staring at charts for hours.

Sometimes the AI agrees with my analysis.

Sometimes it completely disagrees and forces me to reconsider a setup.

That's actually where I've found the most value.

I'm looking for traders willing to test it and tell me where it's wrong.

Not looking for customers right now—just real feedback from people who analyze charts every day.

Extension:  
[ChartSense AI Trading Analyzer]()

What would you want an AI chart analyzer to do that existing indicators don't?
